title: Auto update timeline column based on a date
excerpt:
Hi everyone. 
I have a board with a timeline column where I currently manually enter a week timeline based on a date. For example if the date is 27th June the timeline would be Mon 26-Jun to Sun 2-Jul. All the relevant d…

posts.author: MaxLogic_Lisa (Lisa Armstrong)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone.

I have a board with a timeline column where I currently manually enter a week timeline based on a date. For example if the date is 27th June the timeline would be Mon 26-Jun to Sun 2-Jul. All the relevant data is imported including the date field and then I have to manually add the timeline.

I am looking for a way to automate the timeline. I need the timeline because I have forumla’s based on the timeline that calculates Week Commencing, Week, Month, Year, Year-Week, Year-Month, Year-Qtr (as image below). I need all these for the dashboard graphs.

image898×132 5.44 KB

Thank you.
Lisa

posts.author: ChrisBuna (Chris Buna - Simplified Workflows)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @MaxLogic_Lisa I may have just the app for you!

Take a look here and let me know if you have any questions (feel free to book a demo!): Date & Timeline Mutations - simplifiedworkflows.com

posts.author: Anelso (Adam Nelson)
posts.cookedHtml: Has there been any answer for this? I am looking to do this as well.

posts.author: ChrisBuna (Chris Buna - Simplified Workflows)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Anelso have you checked out the Date & Timeline Mutations app I mentioned? It’s available in the monday marketplace: https://auth.monday.com/marketplace/listing/10000267/date-timeline-mutations

posts.author: Anelso (Adam Nelson)
posts.cookedHtml: I won’t be paying for this. I don’t have the budget for integrations. Please stop pushing people to pay for your software. Monday should include these features in their default package.

posts.author: ChrisBuna (Chris Buna - Simplified Workflows)
posts.cookedHtml: I hear you! That’s why I built the app and did my very best to keep it cost effective for the end user.

posts.author: koko03_30 (Konstantin Botev)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, Lisa,

I think that the TImeline Manipulator app will be pretty helpful in your case. You can check here how it works:

Best of luck,
Konstantin
